entity_resolution.reason: Alignment with primary ingestion interface mandate and ambiguity preservation policy.

memory_cards.statement: Slack is the primary, guardrailed memory ingestion interface for Brain. All durable memory commits must originate from Slack interactions unless explicitly approved for alternative channels.
Ambiguity in memory ingestion must be preserved unless resolved via explicit Slack-based consensus. Superseded or deleted facts must never be presented as current.

details: Slack confirmed as primary ingestion interface for durable memory.
Telegram ingestion deferred pending guardrail expansion.
Ambiguity preservation and superseded fact exclusion enforced.
